title: The Defense Solution
description: Add vanilla craftable defense tool, like barbed wire, mines, and muskets
body:
WIP:

 

This mod add two craftable musket and bullet:

a simple musket & musket with bayonet.

 

use manual : 

on first use, right click with musket cartridge in inventory to load the musket, it will consume the cartridge.

after loading, right click to shoot at target, Enjoy the power of gunpowder.

 

the musket can be used for melee too, but make sure to attach a bayonet to it for big damages.

 

Cautious:

it have recoil...

 

Coming:

- musket enchantments

- potion for bullet

- better musket behavior
